name: Unit4 ERP API
what_it_does: Unit4 ERP REST API for people-centric enterprise resource planning platform. Enables AI agents to manage financial operations, HR data, project management, and procurement across Unit4 Business World (Agresso) and Unit4 ERP. Unit4 specializes in public sector, professional services, education, and non-profit verticals with a focus on people and project-driven organizations.
use_cases: Managing financial entries and period-end processes from accounting automation agents
Processing HR and payroll data from people operations agents
Tracking project financials and resource allocation from project management agents
Integrating Unit4 data with analytics and reporting platforms from BI agents
not_for: SMB without complex public sector or professional services requirements
best_when: A public sector, education, or professional services organization using Unit4 ERP wants AI agents to automate financial operations, HR workflows, and project management integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP financial operations can cascade across linked modules. Unit4 Business World (Agresso) and Unit4 ERP have different API versions — verify which product.

auth.notes: Unit4 uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization code and client credentials flows. Token-based access with scope-based permissions. Enterprise customer credentials required via Unit4 developer portal.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts; pricing per module and user
pricing.notes: Dutch company specializing in public sector and services ERP. Pricing is enterprise-negotiated. Developer sandbox available for customers.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits; configured per customer deployment

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP financial and payroll operations have real financial consequences
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API requiring customer developer portal access
Unit4 Business World (Agresso) vs Unit4 ERP — different products with different APIs
Dutch company — GDPR native; EU-first data residency
Public sector customers may have additional data classification requirements
Limited public documentation — enterprise support engagement required
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP financial, HR, and payroll data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Dutch company — EU-first. Enterprise-only with limited public docs.

security_score_components.security_notes: ERP financial, HR, and payroll data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Dutch company. Enterprise-only.
